intent: Public project consolidation board for GitHub, desktop, and laptop projects.

projects.name: websites
projects.next: Connect to WeAreSwarm project board and deploy reports.

projects.description: Dream.OS-Core is a multi-agent, human-in-the-loop orchestration framework for Dream.OS v2. It coordinates agents, tasks, sessions, recovery, handoffs, locks, and policy through explicit state and artifacts. Core governs swarm behavior and continuity, while external adapters like Agent Cellphone handle message delivery and execution transport
projects.name: Dream.os-Core
projects.next: Compare against canonical DreamVault before merge.

projects.description: Scripts that i turn into agents
projects.name: Agents
projects.next: Inspect README, git status, remotes, and last activity.

projects.description: Agent Cellphone is a standalone swarm transport adapter for Dream.OS v2. It delivers structured commands between human and Cursor agents, supports agent-to-agent handoffs, logs all transport events, and surfaces failures clearly. It is not the orchestration core; it is the messaging and delivery layer that powers autonomy.
projects.name: cursor-cellphone
projects.next: Inspect README, git status, remotes, and last activity.
